title: pteridrys hanoiensis
intro: Pteridrys hanoiensis, also known as the Hanoi fern, is a species of fern native to Vietnam, belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Vietnamese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Pteridrys hanoiensis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Pteridrys hanoiensis are typically harvested and used in teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
